titleStmt.title: SII 24.540: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 540. (A.R. No. 316 of 1952-53.) RĀYAGŌPURAM, HUGE STONE PILLAR IN THE PASSAGE PROPER RIGHT

summary.p: Records the gift of the villages Vīdiviṭaṅkaṉ and Pāchchiyūr situated in Tiruchirāppaḷḷi-uśāvaḍi in Chōḷamaṇḍalam to sixty Śrīvaishṇava Brāhmaṇas of Tirumugattuṟai Ādivarāhapuram by Viśvanāthanāyaka-Chokkanātha-nāyaka on the occasion of a lunar eclipse, the former for colonising the donees and the latter for the Siṟappukkaṭṭaḷai service to the god. The details of the date viz. Śaka 1588, Parābhava, Mithuna śu. 2, Sthiravāra, Pushya regularly correspond to 1666, A.D. June 23, Saturday, f.d.t. 20; f.d.n. 14. This is the only record in this temple which cites the reign of Śrīraṅgadēva-mahārāya of Vijayanagara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājapa
rameśura vīrapratāpa śrīvīra śrī
ragamfor raṅga devamahārāyar pṛthivirājyam
paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam
1000 5 100 8 10 8 Itaṉmel cellāniṉṟa
parābhavanāma samvatsarattu midhunanā
yattu pūrvapakṣattu dvitiyyaiyum
sthiravāsaramum peṟṟa puṣyanakṣatrattunā
ḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭiya kulāśanivaḷanā
ṭṭu viḻāvarāvithi vaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkanti
ruppatiyil nānāgotrattu nānāsū tra
ttu nānāśākhāyyāyikaḷāna tirumukatuṟai Āti
varākapurattil [ śe] ṣa śrīveṣṇavarkaḷu
kkum Ivarkaḷukku perumāḷ prasādam sādi
kkiṟatukkāka śrīraṅganāthasvāmi śrībhaṇḍāra
ttukkum kāśyapagotrattu viśvanātha nāyakka
cokkanāthanāyakkar sahiraṇyodakathārāpū
rvakamāka somoparāgapuṇya kālattile
bhūdānadharmmaśāsanappaṭṭayam paṇṇikku
ṭuttapaṭi . Iṟṟaināḷ tirumukatuṟai Ātivarāka
puram nityavāsattukkāka śrīcoḷamaṇḍala
m kāveriyāṟṟukku tiruccirāppaḷḷi Uḷc
cāvaṭi kiḷakku Ariyamaṅkalam mākāṇi paṟṟukku
veḷūr vaṭṭam nāṟttāmalaic cīrmaiyile co
ḷamātevi vaḷitam Uyyakkoṇṭāṉ vāy
kkālukku vaṭakku Ariyamaṅkalattu Ellaikku kiḷa
kku kuḷamalai Ellaikku teṟku pāppā kuṟicci
Ellaikku meṟku Inta catuśśimaikku Uḷ
ppaṭṭa vītiviṭaṅkaṉāṉa kiṟāmam Oṉṟum
Agrahārakṣetrattukkākavum pācciyūr ci
ṟappu peliveṭṭukkākaRead poliyūṭṭukkākavum kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭapaṭi
yiṉāle vitiviṭaṅkaṉ kiṟāmattil nāṉ
kellaiyum Uḷpaṭa nañcai puñcai nattam
paṭukai ceyttalaittiṭar veḷḷāṉ maṉai U
ḷmaṉai piṟamanai māvaṭai maravaṭai Uḷpaṭa
sakala samudāya prāptiyum nidhinikṣe
patarupāṣāṇa Akṣiṇyāgāmi siddha
sādhyam Eṉṉappaṭṭa Aṣṭapogateja
svāmyaṅkaḷuḷpaṭa tirumukamtuṟai Ā
tivarākapurattukkuṇṭāṉa manaiyañcum
Atukkuṇṭāṉa māvaṭai maravaṭai U
ḷpaṭa Aṟupatu paṅkāka thārāpūrvaka
māka patmatukoṇṭu ciṟappukkaṭṭaḷaikku
pācciyūr viṭṭapaṭiyiṉāle kuṟuṇippa
ṭi 1— taḷikaiyile paṅku Oṉṟukku kā
ltaḷikai dinam paṟṟikkoṇṭu Intapaṭi
cātamum Anta pitipiṭaṅkaṉ grāmmum Uḷ
ḷur vikrayam dānavidhinīyamaṅkaḷukkum
bhogyamāka Ācantrārkkasthayiyā(mā)ka
putrapautra pāramparyamāka tāṅkaḷ A
nupavittuk koḷḷak kaṭavarka*ḷaākavum I[ ppaṭikku]
dānadharmmasāsanam paṇṇikkuṭutto
m Inta Aṟupatu perukkum cokkanāta nā
yakkar
dānapālanayormmadhye dānācchreyonu
pālanam . dānāt svargamavāpnoti pā
lanādacyutam padam . Ekaiva bhaginī
loke sarvveṣāmeva bhūbhujām . nabho
ṇṭu �grāhyā vipradattā vasundharā .
Digital edition of SII 24.540 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
